calendar.matters:
Petition For (1) Order Confirming Trust Assets And Directing Transfer Of The Assets Held In Four Individual Retirement Accounts To Petitioner As Successor Trustee And (2) Instructions Regarding Two Other Individual Retirement Accounts
Off Calendar May-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Sauers appeared by zoom for and with Mary De Jong (successor trustee) by zoom.

The court stated that it read the paperwork and that the only issue is with the Schwab retirement accounts that list Mr. Barker as a secondary beneficiary. Mr. Sauers stated that he and Mrs. De Jong have spoken with Mr. Barker, and that Mr. Barker has stated that he takes no position on the matter and is leaving it up to the court. Mr. Sauers also stated that Mr. Barker has been served. Further discussion was held regarding the timing of when the accounts were opened, when the estate planning took place, the issue of Schwab not having been notified of the change in designation beneficiaries, the trustor having nine years to change the designation and not having done so, there being no explanation for the lapse in time, etc. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets and Directing Transfer of the Assets Held in Four Individual Retirement Accounts to Petitioner as Successor Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

Petition For (1) Order Confirming Trust Assets And Directing Transfer Of The Assets Held In Four Individual Retirement Accounts To Petitioner As Successor Trustee And (2) Instructions Regarding Two Other Individual Retirement Accounts
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Continued To May-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For (1) Order Confirming Trust Assets And Directing Transfer Of The Assets Held In Four Individual Retirement Accounts To Petitioner As Successor Trustee And (2) Instructions Regarding Two Other Individual Retirement Accounts
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Continued To May-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
